name: Ganesh Kalal (MIEAust)
tagline: Project Engineer in Civil, Demolition, Remediation and Infrastructure
kicker: Melbourne VIC, Safety, QA, Procurement, Delivery
heroTitle: I deliver complex demolition and civil works safely, compliantly and on program.
heroSubtitle: Civil and Structural Engineer with 5 plus years of experience delivering major infrastructure and industrial projects across Tier 1 and Tier 2 environments. Strong in subcontractor management, tender evaluation, SOW and RFQ preparation, design review and site supervision. Engineers Australia member, progressing toward NER pathway.
signatureLine: Clear sequence. Strong controls. Clean QA. Deliver it right.
aboutLead: A personal website view of my work, presented in a simple and clear way.
aboutStory: I am a Melbourne based Project Engineer working across demolition, industrial closures, remediation interfaces and civil and structural packages. I focus on structured planning, subcontractor coordination, quality verification and maintaining audit ready documentation. I work closely with clients, consultants and authorities to deliver safe and compliant outcomes.
knownFor: Planning and sequencing of heavy civil and structural works on industrial projects
SOW and RFQ preparation and tender evaluation
Technical review and compliance checks to Australian Standards
Site inspections, hold points, safety audits and conformance reporting
Cost and schedule reporting, variations and EOT support
tools: Project and reporting: MS Project, P6, Procore, Oracle NetSuite, MS Office
Design and drafting: AutoCAD 2D, Civil 3D, 12d, Bluebeam, SketchUp
Structural analysis: SpaceGass, Structural Toolkit, Microstran, MS Tower, RAPT, Inducta

bento.title: How I run a site
bento.preview: Clear sequence, controlled risks, disciplined coordination and clean close out.
bento.fullText: I focus on planning, sequencing and daily control so delivery stays safe and predictable. I keep documentation current and capture evidence progressively.
bullets: Daily prestart and constraints check
Subcontractor coordination and sequencing
Clear access and exclusion zones
Progress reporting and close out evidence

bento.title: Procurement and contracts
bento.preview: Scope clarity and technical and commercial evaluation to support award and delivery control.
bento.fullText: I prepare SOW and RFQ packages, evaluate submissions, support negotiations and administer progress claims and variations during delivery.
bullets: SOW and RFQ preparation
Tender evaluation and comparisons
Progress claims verification
Variations and EOT support

bento.title: QA and compliance
bento.preview: Evidence based QA that stands up during review and handover.
bento.fullText: I maintain ITPs, inspection evidence, RFI tracking and close out documentation progressively so the project is handover ready.
bullets: ITPs and inspection checklists
Hold point verification and reporting
RFI and NCR close out
Close out packs and traceability

projects.title: ExxonMobil Oil Refinery Demolition
